name: HEMOLYTIC-UREMIC SYNDROME
definition: characterized by microangiopathic hemolytic anemia with typical features of DIC

demographics.Histo: microangiopathy including endothelial swelling + thrombus formation in glomerulus +

dominant_finding: kidneys of normal / slightly increased size
discriminating_features: kidneys of normal / slightly increased size
diastolic flow absent / reversed / reduced (= increase in resistance to flow)
return to normal waveforms predates return of urine output

general: kidneys of normal / slightly increased size
diastolic flow absent / reversed / reduced (= increase in resistance to flow)
return to normal waveforms predates return of urine output
Intestines:: mural stratification + narrowing of bowel lumen
